_comment: Structural template for stems.json emitted by stemforge-native. Values are type sentinels (<type>), not actual values — BPM is stochastic and paths are per-run absolute. Derived from v0/src/A/src/sf_manifest.hpp (the C++ writer that mirrors stemforge.manifest.write_manifest()). Track G asserts this shape via test_binary_manifest_schema_compat.
